source: Curated The Patch egg dataset focused on verified benchmark-relevant hatches and major egg metadata.
notes: This file intentionally tracks verified benchmark-relevant hatches instead of claiming every hatchable pet in every historical egg.
Egg value comparisons on the site use only these verified benchmark hatches plus the shared benchmark value ladder.

eggs.name: Cracked Egg
eggs.notes: Current nursery egg. No verified benchmark pets are tracked from the modern Cracked Egg pool yet.

eggs.name: Pet Egg
eggs.notes: Current nursery egg. No verified benchmark pets are tracked from the modern Pet Egg pool yet.

eggs.name: Royal Egg
eggs.notes: Current nursery egg. No verified benchmark pets are tracked from the modern Royal Egg pool yet.

eggs.name: Retired Egg
eggs.notes: The Retired Egg is the modern home for several older nursery pets, including the familiar Dragon and Unicorn benchmark anchors.

eggs.name: Safari Egg
eggs.notes: The Safari Egg matters most today because it introduced Giraffe, one of the strongest benchmark pets on the site.

eggs.name: Jungle Egg
eggs.notes: The Jungle Egg is the key source for Parrot, which keeps it relevant in high-tier trading conversations.

eggs.name: Farm Egg
eggs.notes: The Farm Egg still matters because it introduced Crow and Owl, two upper-tier benchmark pets. Cow also comes from this egg, but it is not included in the calculator until its exact benchmark hatch chance is re-verified.

eggs.name: Aussie Egg
eggs.notes: The Aussie Egg is one of the most practical old eggs for benchmark trading because Turtle and Kangaroo both remain active mid-tier anchors.

eggs.name: Fossil Egg
eggs.notes: No verified benchmark pets are currently tracked from the Fossil Egg in the shared value ladder.

eggs.name: Ocean Egg
eggs.notes: No verified benchmark pets are currently tracked from the Ocean Egg in the shared value ladder.

eggs.name: Desert Egg
eggs.notes: No verified benchmark pets are currently tracked from the Desert Egg in the shared value ladder.

eggs.name: Garden Egg
eggs.notes: The Garden Egg has several interesting pets, but none of its hatches are in the current benchmark ladder yet.

eggs.name: Moon Egg
eggs.notes: No verified benchmark pets are currently tracked from the Moon Egg in the shared value ladder.

eggs.name: Aztec Egg
eggs.notes: No verified benchmark pets are currently tracked from the Aztec Egg in the shared value ladder.

eggs.name: Endangered Egg
eggs.notes: Current live egg. No verified benchmark pets are currently tracked from the Endangered Egg in the shared value ladder.
